meta.title: Le joco quotidian de parolas
meta.description: Divina le parola celate in 6 tentativos (o minus). Un nove enigma es disponibile cata die!
meta.keywords: interlingua, enigma, parola, joco, in linea, divinar, quotidian

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Interlingua. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Interlingua as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Interlingua. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Interlingua. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Interlingua. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Interlingua. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Interlingua. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Interlingua. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Io ha solvite le Wordle de hodie in {n} tentativos. Pote tu facer melio?
text.share_challenge_lose: Io non ha solvite le Wordle de hodie. E tu?
text.hard_mode_position: Modo difficile: {letter} debe esser in position {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Modo difficile: le tentativa debe continer {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Definition e arte AI post le joco
ui.install_app_desc: Jocar sin connexion e obtener le icone
ui.play_more_languages: Joca plus linguas pro vider tu statisticas global!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Joca Wordle cata die como un app
ui.no_games_yet: Tu non ha ancora jocate. Elige un lingua pro comenciar!
ui.easy_desc: Qualcunque parola es acceptate, mesmo si non es in le dictionario
ui.normal_desc: Le tentativos debe esser parolas valide del dictionario
ui.hard_desc: Le indicios revelate debe esser usate in le tentativos sequente
ui.todays_word_reveal: Le parola de hodie — Joca pro revelar!
ui.future_word: Iste parola non ha ancora essite jocate. Reveni plus tarde!
ui.difficulty_locked: Non pote cambiar le difficultate post haber devinato
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
